ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the stock exchange */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing stock price */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing stock price */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_preferences" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the stock */,
  "alerts_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if alerts are enabled for this stock */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Percentage change threshold for alerts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each stock price entry
Foreign key to the stock exchange
Date of the stock price entry
Source of the stock price data
Timestamp when the data was last updated
Country where the company is headquartered
Currency in which the stock is traded
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the user's last login
Boolean indicating if alerts are enabled for this stock
Timestamp when the preference was created
